summary: Added LanguageSwitcher.vue: accessible native select with visible label (i18n a11y.*), aria-describedby hint naming current locale, options from useI18n locales (English / Português Brasil). Change handler uses useSwitchLocalePath + router.push for prefix_except_default routing. Wired into SiteNav (default layout) and showcase HomePage + all four project navs. Locale strings in i18n/locales/en.json and pt-BR.json. Build verified (nuxt build).
